allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(o.data[0], null, 2\)\);}\)")
